name: Lean & Free Sirloin Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef sirloin, cubed into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy sauce and maple syrup in a bowl.
2. Add the beef sirloin cubes and stir to coat evenly.
3. Cover and marinate for 1 hour.
4. Remove the beef sirloin cubes, reserving the marinade.
5. Alternately place the beef sirloin cubes, pineapple chunks, and green pepper squares on a wooden or plastic skewer.
6. Place the kabobs in an 8-inch square microwave-safe or glass baking dish.
7. Brush the kabobs with the reserved marinade.
8. Cover with wax paper.
9. Cook in the microwave on HIGH for 4 minutes.
10. Rotate the dish a quarter turn and brush with the marinade again.
11. Re-cover with wax paper.
12. Continue cooking in the microwave on MEDIUM for another 4 minutes.
13. Allow to rest for 4 minutes before serving.
14. Brush with the remaining marinade just before serving.
WARNING: Adjust the microwave times if you change the size of the recipe. Yield: 8 servings, each approximately 80 calories, 1 medium fat exchange, carbohydrates: 1. Source: Diabetic Microwave Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand, c. 1989, ISBN 0-8069-6957-1
